metrics_excerpt_after_recovery: # HELP spendguard_outbox_pending_oldest_age_seconds Age in seconds of the oldest pending audit_outbox row observed from Postgres.
# HELP spendguard_outbox_forwarder_is_leader Whether this outbox-forwarder pod currently owns the forwarding lease (1=yes, 0=no).

# HELP spendguard_outbox_forwarder_is_leader Whether this outbox-forwarder pod currently owns the forwarding lease (1=yes, 0=no).
